description_long: This is a rectangular, single-story wooden cabin with horizontal plank siding in alternating brown tones. The roof is a simple, dark gray gable style with a prominent rectangular chimney on one side. Three square windows are evenly spaced along one long wall, while the opposite long wall features two windows and a single, plain door. Both short ends of the cabin have a single centered window beneath the gable. The overall design is utilitarian and symmetrical, with no decorative trim or porch. The structure appears solid and functional, suitable for residential use in an urban or suburban neighborhood.
description: A rectangular wooden cabin with a dark gable roof, chimney, and symmetrical window and door placement. The exterior features horizontal plank siding and a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: This view shows the long side of the cabin with three evenly spaced square windows and the dark gable roof overhead.
description_view_1: This end view displays the gable roof, a single centered window beneath the peak, and the chimney visible on the roof.
description_view_2: This side reveals two windows and a single door on the long wall, with the chimney on the left side of the roof.
description_view_3: This end view mirrors the opposite gable, showing a single centered window beneath the roof peak and the chimney on the roof.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch and a single rectangular chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: Five square windows: three evenly spaced on one long side, two on the opposite long side, and one centered on each gable end, all symmetrically arranged
attribute_door_placement: One exterior door located on the long side with two windows, positioned between the windows
